prompt: Realization proxy: choose the best action.
why_v1: Call controls risk when range edge is not strong enough to raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Calling fits because your edge still realizes equity cleanly without inflating the pot from a medium-strength continue.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Call is better when your edge is real but not strong enough to build a bigger pot. You keep the hand playable, realize equity, and avoid turning a medium-strength continue into an unnecessary raise.
